To address the changes in trials by jury, there are several aspects that could be considered. Firstly, technology can play a crucial role in improving trial efficiency and accessibility. For example, live streaming or recording of proceedings can allow remote participation from jurors who might otherwise be unable to attend due to distance or other constraints. This would make the selection process fairer and more diverse. Secondly, digital tools such as artificial intelligence (AI) can help streamline case preparation, analysis, and even prediction of outcomes based on historical data.
